prompt: Accidental candid iPhone 17 Pro Max photo captured from the rear seat of a luxury coastal road-trip car at golden hour. A young woman sits in the front passenger seat beside the open window, turned completely away from the camera and gazing toward the endless ocean. One arm extends outside into the rushing sea breeze, fingers skimming the air, while her other arm rests casually near her lap. She wears an oversized white T-shirt and has lightly sun-kissed skin. Her long hair flows naturally in the wind, illuminated by the warm amber glow of the setting sun. The vehicle is a modern high-end luxury car with premium interior details visible in the dim cabin. The side mirror reflects the winding coastline and ocean horizon. Shot with a wide-angle lens, emphasizing both the spacious interior and the dramatic seaside scenery. The car is moving quickly along a coastal highway, with subtle motion cues in the road and landscape conveying speed and freedom. No flash, reduced exposure, natural shadows, realistic iPhone photography, cinematic summer atmosphere, detailed ocean backdrop, crisp unblurred scenery, authentic travel moment, relaxed posture, carefree mood, orange sunset reflecting on the water, ultra-realistic mobile photography, vertical composition.
